kunterbunt.hueId.markdownDescription: An arbitrary string mixed into the hue hash. Change this to shift all generated colors without switching repositories — useful when two unrelated repos accidentally land on the same color.

kunterbunt.saturation.markdownDescription: Color saturation (0–100) applied to title-bar and activity-bar backgrounds. Lower values produce greyer, more muted colors; higher values produce more vivid colors.

kunterbunt.lightness.markdownDescription: Lightness (0–100) for title-bar and activity-bar backgrounds. Lower values produce darker backgrounds; higher values produce lighter backgrounds. Values in the range 15–40 work best for dark themes.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
